_note: release/39 canonical Switchboard on-demand MAINNET feed map. Mirrors adrena-data/cron/config/switchboard_feed_map.json. adrena_feed_id range 142..255 reserved for Switchboard (pool.rs:126). Crypto block 142-147 mirrors ChaosLabs (0-5) order: SOL, jitoSOL, BTC, WBTC, BONK, USDC. Slots 143 (jitoSOL) and 144 (BTC) currently use DUMMY feed hashes — they MUST be replaced with real Switchboard mainnet hashes from the explorer before Switchboard is enabled for those feeds in any pool's multi_oracle_config. Queue A43DyUGA7s8eXPxqEjJY6EBu1KKbNgfxF8h17VAHn13w is the on-demand mainnet default (SDK Queue.DEFAULT_MAINNET_KEY). Canonical SwitchboardQuote PDA is derived from (queue, [sorted feed_hashes]) and must match what adrena-data's processSwitchboardInstructions sidecar wrote to oracle_batches.metadata.quote_account.

switchboard_feed_map._comment: PLACEHOLDER — replace with real Switchboard mainnet jitoSOL feed hash before enabling Switchboard for jitoSOL on-chain.
PLACEHOLDER — replace with real Switchboard mainnet BTC feed hash before enabling Switchboard for BTC on-chain.
